calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-30-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Catherine Y. Wong, Esq. for Petitioner: Theresa Vu, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Alexandria A. Tran, was sworn and examined.
Order granting application dispensing with notice signed in open court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Alexandria A. Vu.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Reset To Jun-30-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Catherine Wong, Esq. for Petitioner: Therese Vu, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Alexandria A. Tran, was sworn and examined.
No application or Order to Dispense with Notice file with the court.
OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to June 30, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
